chat.title: Messages
chat.emptyState: Select a conversation to start chatting

mentionDropdown.instruction: Press ↑, ↓ to select and Enter to use.

add_members.single_self: You were added to the group by <actorBold>{{actor}}</actorBold>
add_members.many_self: You, <bold>{{targets}}</bold> were added to the group by <actorBold>{{actor}}</actorBold>
add_members.many_self_count: You, <bold>{{targets}}</bold> and {{count}} others were added to the group by <actorBold>{{actor}}</actorBold>
add_members.single_other: <bold>{{target}}</bold> was added to the group by <actorBold>{{actor}}</actorBold>
add_members.many_other: <bold>{{targets}}</bold> were added to the group by <actorBold>{{actor}}</actorBold>
add_members.many_other_count: <bold>{{targets}}</bold> and {{count}} others were added to the group by <actorBold>{{actor}}</actorBold>
add_members.disband_group: The group has been disbanded by the owner

remove_member.by_you: <bold>{{target}}</bold> has been removed from the group by you
remove_member.self_removed: You have been removed from the group
remove_member.by_actor: <bold>{{target}}</bold> was removed from the group by <actorBold>{{actor}}</actorBold>

promote_admin.by_you: <bold>{{target}}</bold> has become admin of this group
promote_admin.self_promoted: You have become admin of this group
promote_admin.by_actor: <bold>{{target}}</bold> has become admin of this group
promote_admin.card_title: You have become admin of this group
promote_admin.card_desc: As an admin, you can manage members in the Group Management section
promote_admin.greeting_message: Hi everyone! I just became admin 👋

demote_admin.by_you: <bold>{{target}}</bold> is no longer an admin of a group
demote_admin.self_demoted: You are no longer an admin of a group
demote_admin.by_actor: <bold>{{target}}</bold> is no longer an admin of a group

transfer_owner.self_promoted: You are now the group owner
transfer_owner.card_title: You have been appointed as the new group owner
transfer_owner.card_desc: From now on, you can change settings and manage the group's content
transfer_owner.greeting_message: Hi everyone! I just became the group owner 👋

update_settings.send_messages_restricted_self: You only allowed group owner/admin to send messages in this group.
update_settings.send_messages_restricted_other: <actorBold>{{actor}}</actorBold> only allowed group owner/admin to send messages in this group.
update_settings.send_messages_allowed_self: You allowed everyone to send messages in this group.
update_settings.send_messages_allowed_other: <actorBold>{{actor}}</actorBold> allowed everyone to send messages in this group.
update_settings.membership_approval_required: Membership approval setting was changed to "Required".
update_settings.membership_approval_none: Membership approval setting was changed to "None".
update_settings.join_by_link_enabled: Join group via link has been enabled.

join_by_link.self: You joined the group via link

generate_join_link.self: You created a group invite link

refresh_join_link.self: You refreshed the group invite link. The old link is no longer valid.
refresh_join_link.by_actor: <actorBold>{{actor}}</actorBold> refreshed the group invite link. The old link is no longer valid.

join_link.label: Join group link
join_link.expired: Group link updated. Review new link in group admin panel.

disbanded.message: The group has been disbanded by the owner.
disbanded.cannotSendMessage: You can no longer send messages to this group

restricted.onlyAdminCanSend: Only <highlight>owner/admins</highlight> can send messages to this group.
restricted.cannotRename: Only owner/admins can rename this group
restricted.cannotChangeAvatar: Only owner/admins can change the group avatar

create-group-dialog.title: Create Group
create-group-dialog.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone number, etc.

join-group-dialog.title: Group Info
join-group-dialog.waiting_room: You're in the waiting room. Join to chat with everyone in the group.
join-group-dialog.link_invalid_desc: This group invite link does not exist or has expired.
join-group-dialog.link_disabled_desc: The admin has disabled joining via link.

rename-group-dialog.title: Set group name
rename-group-dialog.description: Are you sure you want to rename this group? A new group name will be visible to all members.

group-info-dialog.title: Group Info
group-info-dialog.noMedia: No shared image in this group

permissions.pinNotePoll: Pin messages, notes, and polls to the top of a conversation

toggles.allowNewMembersReadRecent: Allow new members to read most recent messages

toggleTooltips.reviewNewMembers: When enabled, new members must be approved by owner or admins to join the group.
toggleTooltips.highlightAdminMessages: When enabled, messages from owner or admin will have a key symbol.
toggleTooltips.allowNewMembersReadRecent: New members can see the entire message history when they join.
toggleTooltips.allowJoinByLink: All members can invite people to join the group by sharing a link with them.

disbandDialog.title: Disband group
disbandDialog.description: Remove all members and delete the group? This CANNOT be undone.

leaveDialog.title: Leave group and delete chat
leaveDialog.description: You will no longer be able to view messages in this group after leaving.
leaveDialog.silentDescription: Only owner/admins will know that you left.

transferOwnerDialog.title: Select a new group owner before leaving
transferOwnerDialog.description: You need to transfer ownership to another member before leaving the group.

actions.blockedMembersDesc: Blocked users cannot rejoin the group, unless they are unblocked or added by the group owner or admins.

transferOwnerConfirm.title: Change group owner
transferOwnerConfirm.description: The chosen person will become the group owner and have all management rights. You will lose your management rights but still be a group member. This action cannot be undone.

sidebarInfo.title: Chat Information
sidebarInfo.noPhotosVideos: No photos/videos shared in this conversation
sidebarInfo.noFiles: No files shared in this conversation
sidebarInfo.noLinks: No links shared in this conversation
sidebarInfo.disappearingMessagesTooltip: Messages will auto-disappear after your setting times
sidebarInfo.disappearingMessagesWarning: Only available for group owner or admins
